automation.title: Intelligent Lead Routing Engine
automation.summary: An AI-driven pipeline that scores, enriches, and routes every inbound lead to the right sales rep in under 800ms.
automation.challenge: A fast-growing SaaS company was losing 38% of inbound leads because manual triage took hours and reps worked in different time zones.
automation.solution: Built a serverless orchestration layer that fuses behavioral signals with firmographic data, runs an LLM classifier for intent, and pushes prioritized leads into the CRM with a warm-handoff Slack message — all under one second.

automation.title: Revenue Intelligence Dashboard
automation.summary: A self-updating BI surface that turns fragmented data sources into a single, plain-language narrative for the leadership team.
automation.challenge: Executives were juggling six dashboards and still couldn't answer 'what changed this week and why' without a 30-minute analyst call.
automation.solution: Engineered an automated data pipeline that ingests product, billing, and marketing signals, then an LLM composes a weekly executive brief with anomalies, drivers, and recommended actions — delivered by 8am every Monday.

automation.title: Conversational Support Concierge
automation.summary: A 24/7 support agent that resolves 64% of tickets autonomously and escalates the rest with full context attached.
automation.challenge: A consumer brand's support team was drowning in repetitive tickets, and customers waited an average of 9 hours for a first response.
automation.solution: Deployed a retrieval-augmented assistant grounded in the brand's knowledge base and order system. It understands intent, takes actions (refunds, status checks), and hands off to humans with a one-paragraph context summary.

websites.title: Maison — Premium Commerce
websites.summary: A headless commerce experience for a luxury lifestyle brand, built for speed, storytelling, and conversion.
websites.challenge: A heritage brand needed an online presence that felt as crafted as their physical boutiques, without sacrificing performance.
websites.solution: Designed and built a headless storefront with cinematic product pages, motion-driven storytelling, and an edge-cached checkout. Lighthouse 99 across the board.

websites.title: Pulse — SaaS Platform
websites.summary: A marketing site and onboarding flow for a B2B analytics startup, engineered to turn curiosity into activation.
websites.challenge: A technical startup had a powerful product but a website that confused visitors and buried the value proposition.
websites.solution: Rebuilt the narrative around outcomes, designed a modular component system, and crafted a frictionless sign-up flow with live interactive previews of the product.

websites.title: Atelier — Portfolio Studio
websites.summary: A portfolio for an independent design studio — a quiet, confident space that lets the work speak.
websites.challenge: A design studio wanted a portfolio that felt premium and intentional, not just another grid of images.
websites.solution: Built a scroll-choreographed experience with editorial typography, case-study deep dives, and a custom CMS so the team can publish without engineering.
